'''Kaisa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was once home to the [[Buro]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. However, it was accidentally driven to extinction by the actions of [[Human/Legends|Human]] geologists.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' {{1stm}}
